info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Domestic Transfer Management API
info.description: The Domestic Transfer Management API facilitates the initiation and processing of domestic transfer transactions within our financial services. It enables businesses and consumers to seamlessly manage their transfer requests, monitor transaction statuses, and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements. Typical consumers include financial institutions and application developers looking to integrate domestic payment capabilities into their offerings. This API streamlines the transfer process while enhancing user experience and operational efficiency.

post.description: This operation allows users to initiate a money transfer within the same country. Ensure that the payment details are accurate before proceeding with the transfer.

requestBody.description: A request body containing the details necessary to initiate a domestic transfer operation. The provided information should comply with the specified schema to ensure successful processing.

200.description: Request completed successfully and the transfer has been processed.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

400.description: The request parameters are invalid or missing.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Operation Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

status.description: The HTTP status code of the response.

error.description: A message describing any error that occurred during the request processing.

errorCode.description: A specific error code associated with the response, if applicable.

message.description: A descriptive message about the successful operation.
message.example: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The path of the request made to the API.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracing the request.

validationErrors.description: A list of validation errors that occurred during the request, if any.

example.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user based on the response.
suggestion.example: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Represents the response structure for a successful domestic transfer operation.

example.message: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

example.suggestion: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

field.description: The name of the field that caused the validation error.

rejectedValue.description: The value that was rejected during validation.

message.description: The error message describing why the value was rejected.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing an individual validation error in the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Transfer Request

transferReference.description: A unique reference for the transfer.

sourceAccount.description: The account number from which the funds will be transferred.

beneficiaryId.description: The ID of the beneficiary who will receive the funds.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Represents the data structure for a domestic transfer request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Error Response

timestamp.description: A timestamp indicating when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code of the response.

error.description: A short description of the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code that can be used programmatically.

message.description: A detailed message indicating the issue encountered.
message.example: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The API endpoint that was accessed when the error occurred.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracking the request through the system.

validationErrors.description: A list of validation errors associated with the request.

example.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

transferReference.description: A reference number associated with the transfer.

sourceAccount.description: The account number from which the funds are being transferred.

beneficiaryId.description: The identifier of the beneficiary receiving the funds.

request.description: The request details that were submitted.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: This schema defines the structure of the error response returned when a domestic transfer operation fails with a 500 status code.

example.message: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

example.suggestion: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Request Body

transferReference.description: A unique reference number for the transfer.

sourceAccount.description: Details of the account from which the transfer is made.

beneficiary.description: The details of the beneficiary receiving the transfer.

notification.description: Preferences for notification regarding the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema for the request body of a domestic transfer operation in the POST request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Source Account

accountNumber.description: The account number of the source account.

accountType.description: The type of the source account (e.g., savings, checking).

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing the source account details.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Beneficiary Details

beneficiaryId.description: A unique identifier for the beneficiary.

accountNumber.description: The account number of the beneficiary.

bankCode.description: The bank code for the beneficiary's bank.

ifscCode.description: The IFSC code for the beneficiary's bank.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing the beneficiary's information for the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Transfer Details

currency.description: The currency in which the amount is specified.

remarks.description: Any additional remarks regarding the transfer.

transferMode.description: The mode of transfer (e.g., immediate, scheduled).

schedule.description: If scheduled, the date and time for the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema providing details about the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Notification Preferences

email.description: Flag indicating whether to send an email notification.

sms.description: Flag indicating whether to send an SMS notification.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema for specifying notification preferences for transfers.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: HTTP status code indicating the error type.

error.description: A short description of the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code identifying the nature of the error.

message.description: A detailed message providing more context about the error.
message.example: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The request path that generated the error.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracing the request in logs.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors encountered during the request.

example.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

sourceAccount.description: The account from which the transfer is initiated.

beneficiaryId.description: The ID of the beneficiary receiving the transfer.

request.description: The original request object that led to the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing the error response for a failed domestic transfer operation.

example.message: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

example.suggestion: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates the request headers that were used to determine the response body variations based on specific conditions.

Location.description: Provides a URI reference to the resource that can be used to locate more details about the error caused by the request.

content-type.description: Specifies the media type of the resource being returned in the response, allowing clients to correctly interpret the content.
